name: comfyui-sampler-info
description: Rich metadata + fuzzy-search picker dialog for ComfyUI's sampler_name / sampler / scheduler combo widgets. TypeScript source in src/, built to web/dist/ via bun build. See ADR-0010.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --target browser --format esm --outdir web/dist --external '/scripts/*' && cp -R web/data web/dist/data
